DocsGet Started
v0.1.0 Now Available

The React Native
UI Framework

Dual-layer design system for iOS & Android. Use styled components out of the box, or take full control with zero-style headless hooks.

Get Started →View on GitHub
terminal
$ bun add @rnui/ui @rnui/tokens installing...✓ @rnui/tokens✓ @rnui/headless✓ @rnui/ui
62+Components
120+Icons
4Packages
100%TypeScript

Built for Modern Apps

Everything you need to ship world-class React Native apps.

01

Design Tokens

Primitive → semantic → component tokens. Override at any level.

02

62+ Components

Everything you need to ship production React Native apps.

03

120+ Icons

Full lucide-react-native library built-in.

04

Dark & Light

System-aware theming with zero flicker.

05

Headless Hooks

Zero-style logic hooks for full control.

06

Multi-Brand

6 preset themes. Create custom brands easily.

62+ Components

More shipping every week.

ButtonInputCardBadgeModalBottomSheetToastTabsAccordionSelectCheckboxSwitchSliderAvatarSkeletonTooltipDrawerDialogSnackbarFABStepperTimelineRatingPaginationTableChipDividerProgressSpinnerTextIconListMenuPopoverRadioSearchBarTextAreaToggleAlertBannerBreadcrumbFormGridAppBarBottomNavSpeedDialImageListAutoCompleteLinkPaperPressableToggleButtonFormFieldPasswordInputEmptyStateCarouselDatePickerOTPInputSegmentedControlTextField

Brand Presets

6 ready-made themes. Swap with one line.
